title: Basic Principles of Hedging: An investor wants to hedge against a potential increase in...
summary: Analyze the mechanics and characteristics of futures contracts.
prompt: An investor wants to hedge against a potential increase in the price of a commodity. Which futures position should they take?

options.text: To hedge against a potential increase in commodity prices, the investor should
A forward contract to lock in the exchange rate
An options contract for downside protection

solution: To hedge against a potential increase in commodity prices, the investor should take a long futures position to benefit from price increases.
